name: Jazmin Bean
description: '''Jazmin Bean''' is an English singer, songwriter, and [[makeup artist]]. Born and raised in [[London]], they{{Efn|Bean is [[agender]] and uses ''[[they/them]]'' pronouns.}} first gained attention online for their "extreme" makeup looks. They self-released their first [[extended play]] ''[[Worldwide Torture]]'' in 2019, which was later reissued in 2020 through [[Interscope]] and [[Island Records]]. Their debut album ''[[Traumatic Livelihood]]'' was released on 23 February 2024.
